_comment: Hand-maintained descriptions for legacy /api/2.0/workspace-conf keys. The legacy API exposes no metadata endpoint, so this file is the source of truth. Add/correct entries as you learn more.

enableIpAccessLists.description: Enables the IP access list feature. Required before creating databricks_ip_access_list resources. Premium/Enterprise tier only - on Free Edition the API returns 404 because the feature isn't provisioned, not because the key is invalid.

enableTokensConfig.description: Enable or disable personal access token (PAT) creation for this workspace.

maxTokenLifetimeDays.description: Maximum lifetime for new PATs, in days. Existing tokens are unaffected. 0 = unlimited (where allowed).

enableServicePrincipalOauthTokens.description: Enable OAuth tokens for service principals.

enableDeprecatedGlobalInitScripts.description: Enable legacy DBFS-based global init scripts (use the global init scripts API instead).

enableLibraryAndInitScriptOnSharedCluste.description: Allow installing libraries and using init scripts on Shared access mode clusters.

enableDcs.description: Enable Databricks Container Services for clusters.

enableGp3.description: Use AWS gp3 EBS volumes (instead of gp2) for cluster nodes.

enableProjectsAllowList.description: Enforce the Repos Git URL allow-list (configured via projectsAllowList).

projectsAllowList.description: Allow-list of Git URL prefixes that Repos may commit/push to. Empty = block all repos.

enableWorkspaceFilesystem.description: Files in Repos / Workspace Files. Choose minimum DBR version that supports arbitrary file access.

enableUploadDataUis.description: Allow the Upload Data UI in the workspace (e.g. importing local files into tables).

enableResultsDownloading.description: Allow users to download query/notebook cell results to their local machine.

enableVerboseAuditLogs.description: Enable verbose mode for workspace audit logs (more event detail at higher volume).

enableDbfsFileBrowser.description: Enable the DBFS file browser UI in the workspace.

enableWebTerminal.description: Enable the Web Terminal in clusters/notebooks.

enableSafeSparkUi.description: Restrict Spark UI access (sanitized view) to limit data exposure.

storeInteractiveNotebookResultsInCustome.description: AWS-only. Store interactive notebook results in the customer's S3 root bucket instead of the Databricks-managed location.

rstudioUserHomeBaseDirectory.description: Default base directory for RStudio Server user homes (applies cluster-wide).

enableHsts.description: Send HTTP Strict-Transport-Security headers from the workspace.

enable-X-Frame-Options.description: Send 'X-Frame-Options: sameorigin' to prevent third-party iframing.

enable-X-Content-Type-Options.description: Send 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to disable MIME sniffing.

enable-sso-default-link-from-account-con.description: Show/use the default SSO link from the account console for this workspace.

enableJobViewAcls.description: Hide jobs from users who don't have access (job view ACLs).

enableWorkspaceAcl.description: Enable workspace object access control. Premium+ tier.

enforceWorkspaceAcl.description: Enforce workspace object access control. Premium+ tier.

enableClusterAcl.description: Enable cluster access control. Premium+ tier.

enforceClusterAcl.description: Enforce cluster access control. Premium+ tier.

enablePoolAcl.description: Enable instance pool access control. Premium+ tier.

enforcePoolAcl.description: Enforce instance pool access control. Premium+ tier.

enableJobAcl.description: Enable job access control. Premium+ tier.

enforceJobAcl.description: Enforce job access control. Premium+ tier.

enableSqlEndpointAcl.description: Enable SQL warehouse / endpoint access control. Premium+ tier.

mlflowModelServingEndpointCreationEnable.description: Allow creation of MLflow Model Serving endpoints in this workspace.

mlflowModelRegistryEmailNotificationsEna.description: Enable email notifications for MLflow Model Registry events.
